final_answer_preview:
I can’t change a person’s name in the directory. Names are read-only in our system.

If you’d like to reflect the change somewhere in the internal system, you have a few options:
- Update email: set a new email address to match the preferred name (please provide the new email).
- Update other attributes: location, role, or team (please specify which field and the new value).
